title: BSNC CARES Act Update
summary: The BSNC Board of Directors announced that it will offer all voting shareholders on record as of Nov. 19, 2021 the opportunity to apply for a second round of CARES Act Direct Assistance. title: CDL Permit Opportunity!
summary: Kawerak’s Employment & Training is pleased to offer CDL learners permit class in cooperation with Northwest Campus and with funding support from Alaska Community Foundation.
